title: Citation of Chapter
doc_html:
§1456.  Citation of Chapter

This Chapter shall be designated and may be cited as the "Uniform Parish Court Jurisdiction and Procedure Act."

Added by Acts 1979, No. 328, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1980.
